news.t: REX Shares Launches Three New T-REX 2X Single-Stock ETFs on AFRM, AXON, and KTOS

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long AFRM Daily Target ETF (AFRU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM), less fees and expenses, through derivatives such as swap agreements. AFRU was launched on Sep 16, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches Three New T-REX 2X Single-Stock ETFs on AFRM, AXON, and KTOS
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX is proud to announce the launch of three first-to-market leveraged ETFs: the T-REX 2X Long AFRM Daily Target ETF (CBOE: AFRU), the T-REX 2X Long AXON Daily Target ETF (CBOE...
